testcase.name: useQueuedAsyncRetry hook should queue retry request while previous loading hasn't finished
testcase.classname: should queue retry request while previous loading hasn't finished

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: expected '<div>' to have text 'false', but the text was 'true'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: expected '<div>' to have text 'false', but the text was 'true' at Context.<anonymous> (/Users/anch/develop/sematic/sematic/ui/src/hooks/tests/helperHook.cy.tsx:46:33) at getRet (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135685:20) at tryCatcher (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:8914:23) at Promise.attempt.Promise.try (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:6188:29) at Context.thenFn (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135696:63) at Context.then (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:135945:21) at wrapped (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:151126:19) at <unknown> (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:149985:15)
+ expected - actual
-'true' +'false'
